title: tylophora dalzellii
intro: Tylophora dalzellii, also known as the Tylophora plant, is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and providing relief from arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. The herbal preparations of Tylophora dalzellii include teas, extracts, and powders, which can be used in various forms to harness its medicinal properties.
